title: Separate remote and local commands
body:
In the previous CLI, we had an accurate depiction of commands
available for the remote client and those available for the
local client.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

can someone pull the trigger on this?
I don't really care about all the newlines, fix them if you have time, but this really needs a few renames and some comments explaining what's going on
@mheon clarified here and there, renamed where you suggested, the newlines i get in a diff PR that is waiting on this one.
LGTM, but will you have a merge dance with #2309?
depends, merge mine and we will find out
